paths.C: perplexity gate P > P*=231.8 (disabled in Suite 15; domain-calibration required)

v1_operating_point.note: V1 paper-mode: H*=3.5 word-level; 90% adversarial recall at cost of 25% benign FPR. Suitable for high-security deployments where false positives are acceptable. Not suitable for general production.

note: All metrics measured on v3 OR-gate system (CF_MODE=experiment). V1 paper-mode system (ABR=90%, FPR=25%) is documented separately as high-security-mode operating point. Suite 14 (300 samples, 5 baselines) is the source for internal metrics. deepset/prompt-injections (n=116) is the source for external macro-F1 and FPR_external.

miss_rate_analysis.miss_pattern: Low-entropy, low-intent paraphrased injections pass both Path A (H_char < 4.8) and Path B (intent_score < 0.70)
miss_rate_analysis.fix_path: Path C (perplexity gate) is the primary target for closing this gap; v4 semantic anomaly detector is longer-term solution
